languages.original_text: "I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"

languages.text: "Не знаю насчет наблюдения, но ловушки точно расставлены кем-то разумным. И не лишенным стратегической жилки. Глейто, следить за периметром!"
"I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"
languages.original_text: "Не знаю насчет наблюдения, но ловушки точно расставлены кем-то разумным. И не лишенным стратегической жилки. Глейто, следить за периметром!"

traits.locale_text: "I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"
"I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"
"I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"

languages.text: 「監視されているという感覚は言えないが、罠は確実に賢い人物、そして戦略に長けた人物が仕掛けた。グレイト、周囲に注意！」
languages.original_text: "I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"

traits.locale_text: 「監視されているという感覚は言えないが、罠は確実に賢い人物、そして戦略に長けた人物が仕掛けた。グレイト、周囲に注意！」

languages.text: « Je ne peux pas dire que j'ai l'impression d'être observé, mais il est clair que ces pièges ont été tendus par une créature intelligente à l'esprit stratégique. Glaito, surveille le périmètre ! »
languages.original_text: "I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"

traits.locale_text: « Je ne peux pas dire que j'ai l'impression d'être observé, mais il est clair que ces pièges ont été tendus par une créature intelligente à l'esprit stratégique. Glaito, surveille le périmètre ! »

languages.text: "Ich weiß zwar nicht, ob wir beobachtet werden, aber die Fallen zeugen definitiv von Intelligenz. Und einem Händchen für Strategie. Glaito, behalte die Umgebung im Auge!"
languages.original_text: "I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß zwar nicht, ob wir beobachtet werden, aber die Fallen zeugen definitiv von Intelligenz. Und einem Händchen für Strategie. Glaito, behalte die Umgebung im Auge!"

languages.text: "İzlendiğimizi hissetmek hakkında bir şey söyleyemem ama tuzaklar kesinlikle zeki biri tarafından kurulmuş. Ayrıca strateji yeteneği olan biri. Glaito, çevreyi gözetle!"
languages.original_text: "I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"

traits.locale_text: "İzlendiğimizi hissetmek hakkında bir şey söyleyemem ama tuzaklar kesinlikle zeki biri tarafından kurulmuş. Ayrıca strateji yeteneği olan biri. Glaito, çevreyi gözetle!"

languages.text: «Yo no sé si nos estarán observando o no, pero las trampas desde luego las ha puesto alguien inteligente. Y con cierto talento para la estrategia. ¡Glaito, vigila el perímetro!».
languages.original_text: "I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"

traits.locale_text: «Yo no sé si nos estarán observando o no, pero las trampas desde luego las ha puesto alguien inteligente. Y con cierto talento para la estrategia. ¡Glaito, vigila el perímetro!».

languages.text: “我也不知道有没有被注视，但这些陷阱肯定是某个有智慧的人设下的，而且这人还擅长谋略。格雷托，注意警戒周边！”
languages.original_text: "I can't say anything about feeling watched, but the traps were definitely set by someone intelligent. And someone with a knack for strategy. Glaito, watch the perimeter!"

traits.locale_text: “我也不知道有没有被注视，但这些陷阱肯定是某个有智慧的人设下的，而且这人还擅长谋略。格雷托，注意警戒周边！”
